$comment: c44 D-CSUBSET-SHIPPED-TYPEDEF-CAST-PARSE: a SHIPPED-typedef cast (size_t)(parenExpr) [size_t from <stddef.h>, injected post-parse] must parse as a CAST, not a call. The fix harvests shipped descriptor typedef NAMES into the existing post-parse cast-vs-call oracle so the reparse commits the cast; c43's offsetof fold then applies. This is sqlite's exact (size_t) offsetof shape (the c43 source-typedef corpus masked it). Exit 42 iff the bare (size_t)(2+3)==5 AND the shipped-(size_t) offsetof folds (uKey==char[offsetof(K,m)=4]). RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the harvest -> (size_t)(parenExpr) parses as a call -> S0004 + S001C. The offsetof fold is at semantic time so the optimized pipelines re-verify the same compile-time size; all 4 targets.
